name: Makenna Richards
ai_summary: Makenna Richards is a 20-year-old UVU special education major from Orem, UT with experience working with children with complex needs. She seeks a part-time position around her school schedule and uses separation and emotional regulation to resolve conflicts.

transcripts.q3: Hi. My name is McKenna Richards, I'm 20 years old and I'm from Orem. I'm currently going to UVU and I'm majoring in special education. I'm about to finish my last year in the program. I have had a lot of good experience with going into classrooms and working with kids because of my degree and I love kids. I love working with them and I love just being around them and helping out especially in an educational setting and I love everything about education and I love working with students with Complex needs and making sure every student gets what they need.
transcripts.q4: I live in Orem as well as Vineyard Utah. So, just anywhere in Utah County.
transcripts.q5: Since my school schedule is so demanding, especially in the fall, I definitely want a part-time position in the summer. I'm definitely a lot more available, but in the fall, I'm not as available. So yeah, part-time
transcripts.q6: During one of my field experiences one kid hit another kid. And the way that I dealt with that in the classroom is taking the other kid and separating them taking them on a walk, kind of regulating their emotions while the other child who maybe was hit is being cared for and talk to and yeah, that's kind of how I've dealt with it. Just making sure that the situation is an escalated anymore and separating the students from each other.
transcripts.q7: I think that I would make a great up, kids, teacher or substitute because I love education. I love helping kids learn best. I love being around them and I love getting out them and I love education and I love kids, I especially love preschoolers. I am interested in doing student teaching with preschool. So this would just be a great opportunity.
